Advent Acolyte Corvette.name: Acolyte Corvette
Advent Acolyte Corvette.description: A small, quick hybrid ship capable of storing and transferring antimatter.

Advent Aeria Drone Host.name: Aeria Drone Host
Advent Aeria Drone Host.description: Powerful Psintegrat manipulate swarms of semi-autonomous drone strikecraft deployed from this cruiser's large hangar bay.

Advent Assembly Drone.name: Assembly Drone
Advent Assembly Drone.description: A civilian frigate equipped with many assembly tools, it builds structures within range of the planet.

Advent Coronata Titan.name: Coronata Titan
Advent Coronata Titan.description: An extremely powerful support ship that can manipulate the tide of battle and turn enemies against themselves.

Advent Destra Crusader.name: Destra Crusader
Advent Destra Crusader.description: The Advent's elite cruiser, it boasts powerful plasma weapons effective against starbases.

Advent Disciple.name: Disciple
Advent Disciple.description: A frontline combat frigate crewed by low caste acolytes.

Advent Domina Subjugator.name: Domina Subjugator
Advent Domina Subjugator.description: A powerful support cruiser whose Psintegrat can cripple enemy ships in combat.

Advent Eradica Titan.name: Eradica Titan
Advent Eradica Titan.description: A mighty warship which is capable of dealing massive damage to enemy ships. Can heal itself with the sacrifice of friendly vessels.

Advent Exoria Illuminator.name: Exoria Illuminator
Advent Exoria Illuminator.description: A warship equipped with many long-range beam weapons.

Advent Halcyon Carrier.name: Halcyon Carrier
Advent Halcyon Carrier.description: Able to support vast numbers of drone strikecraft, this powerful warship strongly supports friendly fleets.

Advent Heavy Missile.name: Heavy Missile
Advent Heavy Missile.description: A powerful self-guided and self-propelled warhead with a large explosive payload.

Advent Herald Envoy.name: Herald Envoy
Advent Herald Envoy.description: A majestic ship that will spread your Culture and improve relations with other factions.

Advent Iconus Guardian.name: Iconus Guardian
Advent Iconus Guardian.description: A large cruiser with support abilities that aid the survival of nearby friendly ships.

Advent Justicia Dreadnought.name: Justicia Dreadnought
Advent Justicia Dreadnought.description: A versatile warship that takes advantage of the loss of friendly ships.

Advent Light Missile.name: Light Missile
Advent Light Missile.description: A small self-guided and self-propelled warhead.

Advent Medium Missile.name: Medium Missile
Advent Medium Missile.description: A powerful self-guided and self-propelled warhead with a moderate explosive payload.

Advent Missionary.name: Missionary
Advent Missionary.description: A large but vulnerable frigate brings the word of the Unity to new colonies on unoccupied planets.

Advent Oblivia Dreadnought.name: Oblivia Dreadnought
Advent Oblivia Dreadnought.description: A heavily armed warship equipped to rapidly destroy large targets.

Advent Progenitor Mothership.name: Progenitor Mothership
Advent Progenitor Mothership.description: A support ship with utility abilities useful for assisting friendly forces; is able to colonize planets.

Advent Purge.name: Purge
Advent Purge.description: A ship equipped with planetary assault weapons, it is tasked with cleansing hostile worlds of heretics.

Advent Radiance Battleship.name: Radiance Battleship
Advent Radiance Battleship.description: A mighty warship that embodies the Advent's thirst for revenge; it is heavily armed with energy weapons.

Advent Rapture Battlecruiser.name: Rapture Battlecruiser
Advent Rapture Battlecruiser.description: Crewed by the Advent's most gifted Psintegrat, the Rapture has many psionic combat abilities.

Advent Revelation Battlecruiser.name: Revelation Battlecruiser
Advent Revelation Battlecruiser.description: A support ship that trades firepower for the ability to manipulate enemy populations.

Advent Seeker.name: Seeker
Advent Seeker.description: A nimble ship well-suited for scouting, its crew's devotion to the Unity is so strong they will even sacrifice themselves to further its goals.

Advent Tempest Vessel.name: Tempest Vessel
Advent Tempest Vessel.description: A lightly armored frigate that launches swarms of wrath missiles.

Advent Vigilis Sentinel.name: Vigilis Sentinel
Advent Vigilis Sentinel.description: A support ship bristling with light weapons, it protects the fleet against strikecraft.

Pirates! Heavy Torpedo.name: Heavy Torpedo
Pirates! Heavy Torpedo.description: An extremely powerful self-guided and self-propelled warhead with a massive explosive payload.

Pirates! Mag Blast Torpedo.name: Mag Blast Torpedo
Pirates! Mag Blast Torpedo.description: An extremely powerful self-guided and self-propelled warhead with a massive explosive payload.

Pirates! Pirate Corsair.name: Pirate Corsair
Pirates! Pirate Corsair.description: A heavy pirate raider, no ship is safe!

Pirates! Pirate Galleon.name: Pirate Galleon
Pirates! Pirate Galleon.description: The ultimate pirate raider - no starbase is safe!.

Pirates! Pirate Pillager.name: Pirate Pillager
Pirates! Pirate Pillager.description: A planet bombing pirate ship, no planet is safe!

Pirates! Pirate Rogue.name: Pirate Rogue
Pirates! Pirate Rogue.description: A light pirate raider, no trade ship is safe!

TEC Advanced Missile.name: Advanced Missile
TEC Advanced Missile.description: A powerful self-guided and self-propelled warhead.

TEC Akkan Battlecruiser.name: Akkan Battlecruiser
TEC Akkan Battlecruiser.description: A support ship that excels at assisting its attendant fleet and is able to colonize planets.

TEC Ankylon Titan.name: Ankylon Titan
TEC Ankylon Titan.description: A mighty warship that specializes in supporting friendly fleets with many defensive abilities.

TEC Arcova Scout Frigate.name: Arcova Scout Frigate
TEC Arcova Scout Frigate.description: A light frigate with powerful engines and remote surveillance equipment, it is adept at reconnaissance.

TEC Breaker Missile.name: Breaker Missile
TEC Breaker Missile.description: An advanced self-guided and self-propelled warhead.

TEC Cielo Command Cruiser.name: Cielo Command Cruiser
TEC Cielo Command Cruiser.description: A support cruiser captained by mid-ranking fleet officers, it can empower and coordinate the attack efforts of others.

TEC Cobalt Light Frigate.name: Cobalt Light Frigate
TEC Cobalt Light Frigate.description: A workhorse combat frigate that is especially effective against missile frigates, support ships and carrier cruisers.

TEC Dunov Battlecruiser.name: Dunov Battlecruiser
TEC Dunov Battlecruiser.description: A balanced support ship that sacrifices firepower for diverse utility abilities.

TEC Garda Flak Frigate.name: Garda Flak Frigate
TEC Garda Flak Frigate.description: A light frigate armed with many rapid firing point-defense weapons. It excels in area defense vs missiles and strikecraft.

TEC Harcka Heavy Cruiser.name: Harcka Heavy Cruiser
TEC Harcka Heavy Cruiser.description: A heavily armored warship equipped with numerous turrets to deal with a wide variety of targets.

TEC Heavy Torpedo.name: Heavy Torpedo
TEC Heavy Torpedo.description: An extremely powerful self-guided and self-propelled warhead with a massive explosive payload.

TEC Hoshiko Robotics Cruiser.name: Hoshiko Robotics Cruiser
TEC Hoshiko Robotics Cruiser.description: An industrial cruiser equipped with unmanned robots, it excels at close combat assistance with both repair and defensive abilities.

TEC Ion Torpedo.name: Ion Torpedo
TEC Ion Torpedo.description: A powerful self-guided and self-propelled warhead.

TEC Javelis LRM Cruiser.name: Javelis LRM Cruiser
TEC Javelis LRM Cruiser.description: A lightly armored cruiser equipped with powerful long-range missiles, effective against heavy cruisers and capital ships.

TEC Kalev Gauss Frigate.name: Kalev Gauss Frigate
TEC Kalev Gauss Frigate.description: An advanced combat ship effective against heavy cruisers, capital ships and structures.

TEC Khevarkov Modular Battlecruiser.name: Khevarkov Modular Battlecruiser
TEC Khevarkov Modular Battlecruiser.description: A powerful warship that can be customized with a variety of offensive loadouts.

TEC Kodiak Medium Cruiser.name: Kodiak Medium Cruiser
TEC Kodiak Medium Cruiser.description: A heavily armored warship equipped with punishing close-range weapons.

TEC Kol Battleship.name: Kol Battleship
TEC Kol Battleship.description: A heavily armed and armored warship that has many direct combat abilities.

TEC Krosov Siege Frigate.name: Krosov Siege Frigate
TEC Krosov Siege Frigate.description: A large frigate that sacrifices combat strength for planetary bombardment capability.

TEC LEV Construction Frigate.name: LEV Construction Frigate
TEC LEV Construction Frigate.description: A civilian frigate equipped with many assembly tools, it builds structures within range of the planet.

TEC Large Missile.name: Large Missile
TEC Large Missile.description: A powerful self-guided and self-propelled warhead with a large explosive payload.

TEC Light Missile.name: Light Missile
TEC Light Missile.description: A small self-guided and self-propelled warhead.

TEC Marza Dreadnought.name: Marza Dreadnought
TEC Marza Dreadnought.description: A powerful warship specialized in long-range attacks and planetary bombardment.

TEC Medium Missile.name: Medium Missile
TEC Medium Missile.description: A powerful self-guided and self-propelled warhead with a moderate explosive payload.

TEC Missile Battery.name: Missile Battery
TEC Missile Battery.description: A stationary platform equipped with missiles and point defense.

TEC Ogrov Torpedo Cruiser.name: Ogrov Torpedo Cruiser
TEC Ogrov Torpedo Cruiser.description: A slow moving cruiser that carries a payload of heavy torpedoes intended for use against starbases and other highly durable targets.

TEC Percheron Carrier Cruiser.name: Percheron Carrier Cruiser
TEC Percheron Carrier Cruiser.description: A support cruiser able to manufacture and field a squadron of strikecraft.

TEC Protev Colony Frigate.name: Protev Colony Frigate
TEC Protev Colony Frigate.description: A large frigate capable of starting new outposts on uncontrolled planets.

TEC Prova Scout Corvette.name: Prova Scout Corvette
TEC Prova Scout Corvette.description: A light corvette with powerful engines and remote surveillance equipment, it is adept at reconnaissance.

TEC Ragnarov Titan.name: Ragnarov Titan
TEC Ragnarov Titan.description: An extremely powerful, long-range warship with superb offense centered around its powerful railgun.

TEC Shriken Gunship Corvette.name: Shriken Gunship Corvette
TEC Shriken Gunship Corvette.description: A small and agile ship effective against low durability targets.

TEC Sova Carrier.name: Sova Carrier
TEC Sova Carrier.description: A warship specialized in mobile production and strikecraft support.

TEC Stilat Missile Corvette.name: Stilat Missile Corvette
TEC Stilat Missile Corvette.description: A small and agile ship effective against medium durability targets.

TEC Super Heavy Missile.name: Super Heavy Missile
TEC Super Heavy Missile.description: A powerful self-guided and self-propelled warhead.

TEC Takadaran Command Fortress.name: Takadaran Command Fortress
TEC Takadaran Command Fortress.description: A versatile warship able to construct cruiser class ships.

TEC Trade Ship.name: Trade Ship
TEC Trade Ship.description: A small commercial vessel that carries merchant cargo between distant worlds.

Vasari Anarkrul Wanderer.name: Anarkrul Wanderer
Vasari Anarkrul Wanderer.description: A huge transport with many strikecraft and space for mobile infrastructure.

Vasari Antorak Marauder.name: Antorak Marauder
Vasari Antorak Marauder.description: A quick warship with moderate firepower, it excels at harassing enemy positions.

Vasari Bombardment Platform.name: Bombardment Platform
Vasari Bombardment Platform.description: A stationary weapon platform specialized in attacking planets.

Vasari Jarrasul Evacuator.name: Jarrasul Evacuator
Vasari Jarrasul Evacuator.description: An immense support ship that carries much of the surviving Vasari populace, it has many utility abilities and can colonize planets.

Vasari Jarun Migrator.name: Jarun Migrator
Vasari Jarun Migrator.description: A large cruiser capable of colonizing unowned planets. May also equip a single starbase deployment item in its large cargo bay.

Vasari Jikara Navigator.name: Jikara Navigator
Vasari Jikara Navigator.description: A light corvette that is equipped with pathfinding sensors and powerful engines, making it an ideal scout.

Vasari Junra Assembler.name: Junra Assembler
Vasari Junra Assembler.description: A civilian frigate equipped with many assembly tools, it builds structures within range of the planet.

Vasari Junsurak Warden.name: Junsurak Warden
Vasari Junsurak Warden.description: A light frigate armed with rapid firing pulse weapons and agile missiles, it safeguards the fleet from corvette and missile threats.

Vasari Jusotra Fabricator Cruiser.name: Jusotra Fabricator Cruiser
Vasari Jusotra Fabricator Cruiser.description: A support cruiser that can reclaim orbital debris to supply its onboard ship fabrication and retrofit facilities.

Vasari Kanrak Assailant.name: Kanrak Assailant
Vasari Kanrak Assailant.description: A combat frigate armed with long-range phase missiles, effective against heavy cruisers and capital ships.

Vasari Karrastra Destructor.name: Karrastra Destructor
Vasari Karrastra Destructor.description: A cruiser equipped with strong planetary assault beam weapons.

Vasari Kortovas Oppressor.name: Kortovas Oppressor
Vasari Kortovas Oppressor.description: A heavily armored warship equipped with numerous turrets to deal with a wide variety of targets.

Vasari Kortul Devastator.name: Kortul Devastator
Vasari Kortul Devastator.description: A heavily armed and armored warship, it leads the Vasari armada into battle.

Vasari Kultorask Titan.name: Kultorask Titan
Vasari Kultorask Titan.description: A powerful support ship which can use advanced nano-technology to inflict damage on enemies or to heal friendly ships.

Vasari Lasurak Transporter.name: Lasurak Transporter
Vasari Lasurak Transporter.description: A large and relatively unarmed cruiser, it acts as a mobile platform for Vasari strikecraft.

Vasari Phase Missile.name: Phase Missile
Vasari Phase Missile.description: A powerful self-guided warhead that has a chance to bypass enemy shields by phasing out.

Vasari Ravastra Skirmisher.name: Ravastra Skirmisher
Vasari Ravastra Skirmisher.description: A light attack frigate that is especially effective against missile frigates, support ships and cruiser carriers.

Vasari Serevun Overseer.name: Serevun Overseer
Vasari Serevun Overseer.description: A support cruiser that reduces enemy combat effectiveness. It can be upgraded to detect enemy phase lane movements.

Vasari Skirantra Carrier.name: Skirantra Carrier
Vasari Skirantra Carrier.description: A warship boasting a number of nanotechnology abilities and many squadrons of strikecraft.

Vasari Sularkon Tyrant.name: Sularkon Tyrant
Vasari Sularkon Tyrant.description: An imposing icon of dominance with powerful suppressive abilities.

Vasari Sulsurak Defensor.name: Sulsurak Defensor
Vasari Sulsurak Defensor.description: A small, quick hybrid ship capable of hunting down opposing missiles, strikecraft, and corvettes.

Vasari Tosurak Raider.name: Tosurak Raider
Vasari Tosurak Raider.description: A small, agile ship well equipped to perform raids on enemy orbital infrastructure or destroy hostile cruisers.

Vasari Vorastra Titan.name: Vorastra Titan
Vasari Vorastra Titan.description: A highly adaptive warship capable of quick movements. Is able to inflict area of effect damage to enemies.

Vasari Vulkoras Desolator.name: Vulkoras Desolator
Vasari Vulkoras Desolator.description: A powerful warship well equipped for attacking and sieging enemy planets.

Vasari Vulrak Penetrator.name: Vulrak Penetrator
Vasari Vulrak Penetrator.description: An extremely tough warship equipped with an armor piercing short-range beam weapon.
